title: Datadog の 404 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: Most factual claims are accurate and well-aligned with Datadog's official documentation and general technical standards.
The article provides relevant and up-to-date API endpoints and log file locations, with many sources dated June 2026.
The frontmatter contains garbled text in the description field, which needs correction.

Claims regarding implementation difficulty, reboot requirements, and OS compatibility in the quick reference table are reasonable judgments but lack direct external citation for these specific ratings.
duplicate source URL for the same claim was ignored
no URLs resolved to known official domains

sources.title: メトリクス - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: モニターID またはダッシュボード ID が間違っている、存在しないリソースにアクセスしようとしている、または該当するメトリクスがまだ Datadog に送信されていない状況で発生します。

sources.title: メトリクス - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: クエリで指定したメトリクスが Datadog に送信されていない、または既に削除された場合、ダッシュボードやグラフの表示時に 404 が発生します。

unsupported_claims: description: 謖・ｮ壹＠縺溘Γ繝医Μ繧ｯ繧ｹ繝ｻ繝｢繝九ち繝ｼ繝ｻ繝€繝・す繝･繝懊・繝峨′隕九▽縺九ｉ縺ｪ縺・€・繝｢繝九ち繝ｼID。
The entire "解決策の早見表" (Quick Reference for Solutions) table, including claims about "実装難易度" (Implementation Difficulty), "再起動要否" (Restart Required), and "対応OS" (Supported OS).
improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: add official or primary source URLs for unsupported or weakly sourced claims.
Optional improvement: Correct the garbled Japanese text in the 'description' field of the frontmatter.

Optional improvement: Consider adding a note to the '解決策の早見表' (Quick Reference for Solutions) that the difficulty/reboot/OS ratings are based on common practices and expert judgment, as direct official documentation for these specific ratings is unlikely.
Optional improvement: Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.
Optional improvement: Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.
